calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeremy Michaels appeared by telephone for and with Jade Lewis (also on the line) and Robert Lewis (also on the line).

Mr. Michaels stated that he performed the wedding/marriage ceremony seven years ago, that unfortunately the license and certificate of marriage was never recorded with the registrar, that Mr. and Ms. Lewis have been living as a married couple during that time and now have a child, and that they became aware of the issue when Ms. Lewis applied for a passport and was unable to obtain one. The Court informed Mr. Michaels that the order establishing fact of marriage can not have any cross outs/corrections and that he needs to prepare a corrected order to reflect his name as the petitioner and that Robert Lewis' name needs to appear on 1-C instead of 1-D. The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage (subject to receipt and review of a corrected order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
